name: Cloudflare Developer Documentation Fundamentals Glossary
description: Cloudflare Developer Documentation Fundamentals Glossary — ~412 terms used across Cloudflare's developer documentation, each tagged with the originating product (Spectrum, Workers, R2, Pages, WAF, Zero Trust, Magic Transit, DNS, etc.). The product tagging makes this glossary uniquely useful as a service-coverage map across Cloudflare's portfolio.
relationToCloudSecurity: Direct — Cloudflare is a CDN/security platform; terms cover edge security, DDoS, bot management, WAF, zero trust, DNS security, mTLS, etc.
relationToAISecurity: Includes AI-relevant entries (AI Gateway, prompt injection, LLM-related terms in WAF subset).

license.notes: Cloudflare, Inc. copyright. Public stub only; structured extraction lives in the private dataset companion repo (gated CSA access).

lifecycle.notes: Rolling developer-documentation glossary, updated alongside Cloudflare product releases.

current_extraction.notes: Metadata-only stub. License prohibits public redistribution; the structured extraction is held in the private dataset companion repo (dataset-private-laws-regulations-standards) and exposed only via the planned authenticated SecID resolver.

extraction_history.reason: Stub created on the public side to mirror the private-repo structured extraction. Discovered via developers.cloudflare.com/llms.txt index, 2026-05-21.

notes: Mirror-stub for a Cloudflare developer-docs per-product glossary documented in PROCESSING-GLOSSARIES.md (dataset-private repo). Public-side metadata only; no term content held here.
